Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Centaur — Armored Escapist HP: 40/59
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS!
⚡ Centaur — Armored Escapist casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:10 total 20 vs AC 20 — still hits.
--- Centaur — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Centaur — Armored Escapist casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Centaur — Armored Escapist casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Centaur — Armored Escapist for 6. HP: 46/59
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Centaur — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Centaur — Armored Escapist casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS!
→ Half damage: 7
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 31 damage. Centaur — Armored Escapist HP: 15/59
→ Concentration save: [20 vs DC 15] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Centaur — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
